title: Sugar Colt
writer: Augusto Finocchi, Giuseppe Mangione, Sandro Continenza
actors: Jack Betts, Soledad Miranda, Giuliano Raffaelli
plot: To avenge a friend and to fulfill his last wish, Tom has to find out what happened to an army corps that has mysteriously disappeared. He therefore puts on the disguise of a doctor and starts investigating in a somewhat uncomforta...
